parents.subject: LU-19246 tests: Error if FORCE_LARGE_NID=true w/o ipv6

commit.subject: LU-19248 lnet: debug IPv6 bind error
commit.message:
LU-19248 lnet: debug IPv6 bind error

This is a debug patch for collecting more info
on IPv6 bind error exposed by sanity_lnet test_107
caused by 2e49bc7dd1 LU-18812

Test-parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-lnet env=FORCE_LARGE_NID=true
Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib43dcd2b5cce0cb3a51e49e3c67cdf424c8c912e
